# 🧩 Pull Request Template

> New to GitHub? No problem.
> This form helps reviewers understand your change quickly and safely.

## 👋 What is a Pull Request?

A Pull Request (PR) means:
"I made changes and I would like them added to this project."

You do not need advanced coding knowledge to fill this.
Plain language is totally fine.

---

## ✍️ 1) What did you change?

<!-- Describe your change in 2-5 simple lines. -->

## 🎯 2) Why was this change needed?

<!-- What problem does this solve? -->

## ✅ 3) What is improved now?

<!-- What works better after this PR? -->

---

## 🏷️ Change Type

- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code cleanup)
- [ ] 🧹 Chore (maintenance)

## 🔗 Related Issues

<!-- Example: Closes #123 -->

---

## 🧪 Testing & Validation

- [ ] I tested the change locally
- [ ] I checked links and file paths
- [ ] I checked desktop and mobile behavior
- [ ] I checked basic accessibility (clear text, semantic structure, alt text if needed)
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or private data

### 🛠️ Manual test steps

2. 
3.
